name: 合影照片
reference_prompt: A rectangular 5cm x 7cm color photo printed on glossy photo paper, front side showing Ryuzaki and a young waitress posing together for a joint photo, with a vibrant neon-lit bar background featuring flickering lights, no text or additional elements; back side is plain white photo paper with no images, text, or patterns; oriented front-facing toward the camera.。源记录硬约束：数量:1；位置:KENICHI_PHONE屏幕上；运动政策:点开后静止显示

source_contract.quantity_policy: 只允许这一张 JOINT_PHOTO；不得生成照片堆或额外照片副本
